name: Soundcore Life Q30

protocol._doc: host->device: 08 ee 00 00 00 <cmd:2> <len:2 LE total> <payload..> <crc(sum8)>. device->host: 09 ff 00 00 01 <cmd:2> <len:2 LE> <payload..> <crc>. Command bytes = OpenSCQ30 Command([hi,lo]).

_capabilities_source: Composed 2026-07-08 from OpenSCQ30 (github.com/oppzippy/OpenSCQ30, soundcore/a3028.rs) + Orchestra's hardware-verified Space One Pro / Liberty 4 Pro templates (same soundcore_v1 framing). Over-ear ANC (A3028). OpenSCQ30: 3 ambient modes (Normal/Transparency/NoiseCanceling) + NC sub-modes (Transport/Indoor/Outdoor), EQ, auto power-off, single battery. No feature toggles. ALL functions ship _verified:false: command bytes are OpenSCQ30-/cousin-derived, not tested on this exact model — opt in per control in the Devices tab and confirm before trusting. Only the ANC 'sound_mode' (settingId 1001) and the feature toggles inject natively; EQ/button/battery are catalog-only for now. IMPORTANT: the RFCOMM control UUID (…d6832e7b3028) is derived from the model code and is a BEST GUESS — the socket won't open if it's wrong (cf. Liberty 4 Pro, whose UUID uses 3954 though the model is A3957). Confirm the vendor service UUID from an sdp/btsnoop dump before relying on this device.

functions.title: Noise control
functions._verified_note: Sound-mode command 0681 + mode mapping from OpenSCQ30; the exact payload (esp. the noise-canceling sub-mode / adaptive bytes and the discrete off/transparency mapping) is UNVERIFIED on this model — opt in via the Devices tab and confirm on-device before flipping _verified:true.
